titleStmt.title: SII 34.167: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 167. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock outside the west prākāra wall of the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra II, 7th year = A.D. 1059.

Built in and incomplete. Lines 1—30 give the meykkīrtti (eulogy) of the king with several orthographical mistakes. The last three lines refer to some transaction between the nagaram of Sivapādasēkarapuram and a Viḻupparaiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumātu puviyeṉṉum perumāta rivar viyarkaḷāka mītoḷir veṇ
kuṭai Uyarttut tiṇkali kaṭittut taṉ ciṟu yākiya Eṟivalik kaṅkaikoṇṭa
cōḻaṉaip poṅkikal lirumuṭicōḻa neṉṟu tammuḷ veṉṟikoḷ mummaṭicō
ḻattemmuṉai ṉ norukaḻal vīracōḻaṉaip paṭipukaḻ
karikālacōḻaneṉṟum perutiṟal vāḷa maturāntakaṉaic cōḻakaṅkaneṉ
ṟum tōḷvali mēvutaṟppa neṉṟum ta taṉporukarutu
kātalaruḷi talampukaḻum rājēntracōḻa ḻaneṉṟum tottaṇimukai viḻalaṅkalamuṭikoṇṭa cōḻaṉai
Ikal vicaiyālaiyaneṉṟum pu yarkaḷiṟṟuc cōḻakēraḷaṉai vārccilaic cōḻa kēraḷaneṉṟum
tiṇṭiṟakkakiṭāraṅkoṇṭa cōḻaṉai kulattuc ciṟappamar cōḻa canakarācaneṉa kaṉaikaḻal paṭi ko
ṇṭa palpukaḻmuṭikoṇṭa pala ṇṭa cōḻaṉai cuntaracōḻaneṉṟum cen miḻppiṭi I
raṭṭapāṭi koṇṭacōḻaṉai ṭaccōḻa kannakucci rācaneṉṟu maṉṉutaṉ kātalar tam
mētaku katirāṅkaṉai kaḻal maturāntaka neṉṟu māṉaccilaik kaiyōrāṉai
kaṉai nirupēntra cōparumaṇiccai nikaḻu nāḷi
ṟoṇṭiṟa liraṭṭamaṇ natikaḷum kekaḻum Aḻi
neṉṟum moḻupporukeṭṭu paripavamiṉakki
tu cepparun tīrttak koppattakavaiyil ṅkiya poḻutavaṉ ceñcāmāritaṉ
mtaṉ tiruttuṭaiyiṉuṅ kuṉṟi nṟakaḷiṟeṟi
maṭiyavum vakaiyātorutaṉiyanē kkutampi jayaciṅ
lakkēciyum tarāttacayaṉmanum māṉamaṉ Āḷava maṇpukaḻāṇu
yaṉum teṉaṟamamaṭṭa viḻalaṅkal mo Enumivar mutaliyar
ṇiliyaraicarai viṇṇakattēṟṟi koṉṉavilpaṭai
kuṇṭamayaṉum Eṉṟiṉṉavecciṉa kulakula kulaintu talaimayir virittu muṉ
nuṟam nākaviṟippa pōytturattiya poḻutaccerukkaḷatta
van viṭucatturu payaṅkaraṉ ṭṭaraicanēkamumeṭṭu niṟaipparikaḷum O
ṭṭaka niraikaḷum Oṭṭiya saṅṅappaiyum
meṉṟivarmutal nātēviyar muṉaivai
koṇṭu vijaiyapiṣēkam paṇ ṭāttikkārk kaṭaliṅkai
yil viṟṟap paṭaikkaliṅ kamaṉ Ilaṅkaya
rkkiṟaivaṉmānaparaṇaṉ talariru ṭaippiṭit mikavaḷartta kōpparakēcaripar
marāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājEntra tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu nāṭṭu ci
vapāta cēkarapurattu nakarattōm
ṭṭa nāṭṭu viḻupparaiyaṉ kai ḷancāttanāna Aḻaka yi ṭṭa
kaiyvi nāḻaṟaimai cīyūr nāṭṭukko
Digital edition of SII 34.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
